label: Contact Form
description: A contact form with configurable fields that submits via AJAX. Supports name, email, phone, subject, and message fields with validation. Shows success/error feedback inline. Use for contact pages, inquiry forms, support requests. Layout: clean form with labeled inputs, validation messages, and submit button with loading state.

field_schema.label: Success Message
field_schema.default: Thank you! We'll be in touch.

test_data.heading: Get in Touch
test_data.description: We'd love to hear from you. Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
test_data.success_message: Thank you! We'll be in touch.
